parsed.production_notes: The presenter exhibits uncanny facial smoothness and slightly unnatural lip-syncing. The head movements are somewhat robotic and disconnected from the torso, typical of AI-generated avatars.

characters.appearance: A young adult with a fair complexion and short, dark brown hair styled in a side part. They have dark eyes, defined eyebrows, and a smooth, unblemished face. Their features are symmetrical and slightly synthetic in appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A light greyish-green, long-sleeved button-down shirt. In the first half, they wear large black over-ear headphones.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, informative, and direct, though slightly stiff in movement.

scenes.setting: Indoor studio or office setting, daytime. Blurred brick wall and a large potted plant.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is positioned in the center of the frame, looking directly forward. They are wearing a light greyish-green, collared button-down shirt and large, black, over-ear headphones. The background is slightly out of focus. On the left side of the background, a section of an exposed red brick wall is visible. On the right side, the large, broad leaves of a green indoor plant fill the space. The lighting is soft and natural, illuminating the person's face evenly.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks directly to the camera, introducing the topic. An animated smartphone mockup appears on the right side of the screen, displaying various screens of an app's interface. A brand logo is visible in the top right corner. Large text captions appear at the bottom of the screen, syncing with the spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: If you're an immigrant, you might wonder if native speakers understand your accent.
Character A says: There's a pronunciation app, BoldVoice, that tests your accent and helps you learn an American one with instant AI feedback.
scenes.on_screen_text: If you're an immigrant you might wonder if native speakers understand your accent. There's a pronunciation app BoldVoice that tests your accent and helps you learn an American one with instant AI feedback.

scenes.setting: Indoor studio or office setting, daytime. Blurred brick wall and a large potted plant.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered in the shot, facing the camera. They are wearing the same light greyish-green button-down shirt, but the large headphones have been removed. A small, black lavalier microphone is now clipped to the right side of their shirt collar. In their right hand, they are holding up a smartphone that has a distinctive pink and white marbled case with a round pop-socket attached to the back. The background remains consistent, showing the blurred brick wall on the left and the large green plant on the right.

scenes.visual_description: Character A, now without headphones and using a lavalier mic, demonstrates the app by speaking into it. An app interface overlay appears on the screen, showing a pronunciation score that improves after a second attempt. The brand logo remains in the top right. Text captions continue to display at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Theater.
Character A says: Looks like I have to work on that first "th".
Character A says: Theater.
Character A says: I fixed it!
Character A says: It's super easy.
Character A says: Download BoldVoice on your phone.
Character A says: Get your results and let BoldVoice boost your confidence.
scenes.on_screen_text: Theater Looks like I have to work on that first "th" Theater I fixed it! It's super easy. Download BoldVoice on your phone. Get your results and let BoldVoice boost your confidence.

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene consists entirely of a solid, dark grey background. There are no characters, props, or environmental details present in the underlying image. The lighting is flat and uniform across the entire frame.

scenes.visual_description: A dark grey end card is displayed. In the center is a smartphone mockup playing a video of Character A. Above the phone is a gold laurel wreath graphic with five stars and a rating number. Below the phone is promotional text offering a free trial, along with the brand logo and an app store download badge.
